overall.description: A first-person walk along the Del Perro Pier in GTA V during golden hour. The camera moves steadily past colorful beachfront shops including Pier Burger, the Funnel Factory, and the Pleasure Park amusement entrance, transitioning from wooden boardwalk to paved pier with expansive ocean views.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden boardwalk past Pier Burger and adjacent beachfront shops

weathered wooden planks forming the main walkway surface
sandy beach and ocean visible beyond the boardwalk railing
tall curved metal street lamps lining the beachside path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on the Del Perro Pier wooden boardwalk during golden hour. Pier Burger's distinctive red building dominates the left side while the beach and ocean stretch out to the right. The camera moves forward past trash bins and street lamps, with a few pedestrians visible walking in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: colorful amusement arcade storefronts with outdoor seating

agents.ego_description: continuing past the Funnel Factory and Harbor Grill with red picnic tables visible on the left

entered.detail: bright yellow building with large yellow signage reading Funnel Factory
green and orange storefront with Coca-Cola signage and American flag decals
red painted wooden picnic tables and benches for outdoor dining

segments.scene_description: The boardwalk continues past colorful storefronts including the yellow Funnel Factory and the green Harbor Grill. Red picnic tables line the left side of the wooden deck. The crowd density increases slightly with pedestrians browsing the shops as the camera moves steadily forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: amusement park entrance with decorative metal canopy and cactus planters

events.description: approaching the large colorful Pleasure Park entrance structure with hanging banners

agents.ego_description: walking under the colorful metal canopy of the Pleasure Park entrance past standing pedestrians

notable_agents.action: man standing near the Funnel Factory entrance holding a drink and looking around

entered.detail: large colorful metal framework with hanging banners and Pleasure signage overhead
wooden planters with tall cacti and flowering plants flanking the entrance
red food cart with large yellow and red umbrella featuring a hot dog mascot

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and passes under the elaborate Pleasure Park entrance, a colorful metal structure with decorative banners and large cactus planters. The snack cart with its distinctive umbrella becomes visible ahead as the wooden boardwalk continues. Pedestrians stand near the shop entrances, and the Harbor Grill and Funnel Factory recede behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pier with snack cart and paved brick surface

events.description: ground surface changes from wooden planks to red paved brick tiles

agents.ego_description: passing the hot dog snack cart and continuing along the paved pier toward the end building

notable_agents.action: vendor standing at the hot dog cart under the colorful umbrella

entered.detail: red brick paved walkway replacing the wooden deck surface
modern dark-colored building structure at the end of the pier

segments.scene_description: The wooden planks give way to red paved bricks as the camera moves past the snack cart with its vendor. The Pleasure Park structure falls behind, and the pier opens up with the end building becoming more prominent in the distance. The ocean remains visible to the right as pedestrians walk ahead on the paved surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pier end with ocean overlook and distant city skyline

agents.ego_description: walking toward the end of the pier with expansive ocean views and the setting sun visible

entered.detail: city buildings and skyline visible across the water on the horizon
open ocean view with setting sun reflection on the water
metal safety railing along the pier edge overlooking the water

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens up to the end of the pier with panoramic ocean views. The distant city skyline appears on the left horizon while the pier end building grows larger ahead. The paved walkway continues with metal railings along the right side, and the setting sun casts long shadows across the open pier area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along the Del Perro Pier boardwalk, transitioning from a view of beachfront eateries toward the ornate entrance of an amusement park. It begins beside the red facade of Pier Burger, moving past street lamps and trash bins while the ocean stretches out to the right under the golden hour light. As the camera advances, the scene shifts past a series of colorful storefronts, including the yellow Funnel Factory and green Harbor Grill, with red picnic tables lining the wooden deck. The perspective then expands as the camera passes under the elaborate metal structure of the Pleasure Park entrance, flanked by decorative banners and large cactus planters. Finally, the storefronts recede into the distance as the camera moves toward a snack cart with a distinctive umbrella further down the boardwalk.

The shot follows a continuous forward movement along the pier as the enclosed boardwalk transitions into an expansive, open-air vista. It begins where the wooden planks give way to red paved bricks, gliding past a snack cart and its vendor as the Pleasure Park structure recedes behind the camera. As the path opens up, the pier's end building becomes more prominent in the distance while pedestrians walk ahead beside the ocean. The scene then expands into a panoramic view of the pier's terminus, revealing the distant city skyline on the left horizon. Finally, the camera advances along the paved walkway and metal railings as the setting sun casts long shadows across the open landscape.
